channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Dune: Awakening 1.4.0 Hits the Public Test Client For Some Polish
item.content:encoded:
Dune: Awakening’s latest public test client update offers a peek at the next update, including new Overland map locations, fixes, some combat AI tweaks, and quality of life improvements.

This update, Funcom announced, won’t feature a new story chapter this time around when it goes live on May 19th, instead this will be a smaller, more technical update. There will be a new DLC release, but we’ll be back to getting more free story content, a new map, and new locations in future patches.

In the test build, you’ll find The Old Quarry Testing Station and The Wind Pass, a new location key to the water trade on Arrakis, and once a Harkonnen tech hub. In the testing station, you’ll get to confront Dr. Jalanta, a scientist with questionable morals within a hidden lab.

There are a number of adjustments and fixes too. Abomination AI is the main combat fix, and this should make abominations less aggressive and a little easier to handle. Notably, if you betray your faction at rank 20, you won’t have to replay all of the content from your new faction to that point. They are improving building replication performance and performance for player and vehicle cameras. There are also some additional technical fixes like memory improvements to fabricators, refineries, and turbines, and rendering improvements.

Funcom is also addressing some lingering crash and performance issues. 

There’s more in the patch notes, which also give an idea of the scope of this one.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/dune-awakening-140-hits-the-public-test-client-for-some-polish-2000138003
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
